summary: MLBN 24/7 Live Linear playback behind live point
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for a 24/7 Live Linear feed
AND the user is logged in
AND the user selects a 24/7 Live Linear stream to watch

**NOTE:** 24/7 Live Linear feed entitlements
- MLBN
- SNY_121
- SNLA_119

steps.action: WHEN the playhead is behind the live point
steps.result:
THEN the live indicator is gray
AND the "Jump to Live" button displays
AND the scrubber bar to the left of the playhead is blue
AND the scrubber bar to the right of the playhead gray
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position
